0.q: These findings show MnSOS3 boosts salt tolerance via Na⁺/K⁺ homeostasis and SOS pathway activation.

1.q: ethylene-insensitive3 (EIN3)/EIN3-like (EIL) proteins are the key components of ethylene signal transduction... we functionally characterized a gene encoding an EIN3-like protein from mulberry, designated as MnEIL3.

2.q: The ectopic overexpression of MnT5H2 increases melatonin content in transgenic tobacco ... the levels of substances in the melatonin synthesis pathway were significantly increased.

3.q: MnEIL3 overexpression in Arabidopsis significantly upregulated the transcript abundances of ethylene biosynthetic genes.

4.q: The yeast two-hybrid assay confirmed MnSOS3-MnSOS2 interaction.

5.q: Tryptamine-5-hydroxylase (T5H) is an enzyme essential for the biosynthesis of melatonin in plants ... T5H catalyzes the conversion of tryptamine to serotonin.

6.q: Transgenic leaves accumulated 54.8% less Na⁺ and 45.8% more K⁺ than WT, leading to a 67.8% lower Na⁺/K⁺ ratio.

7.q: MnEIL3 enhanced the activities of the MnACO1 and MnACS1 promoters, which respond to salt and drought stresses.

8.q: Furthermore, MnEIL3 enhanced the activities of the MnACO1 and MnACS1 promoters, which respond to salt and drought stresses.
